content.text:
```mdl
@ Non‑Disclosure Agreement – OISAIR Project
module contract_nli_no_align_dev_3_nda_12

open std.collections
open std.strings

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Types
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 1 – Definitions
type ConfidentialInformation = {
    is_confidential: bool,          # true if the data falls under the definition of “Confidential Information”
    is_independently_developed: bool,  # true if the Receiving Party created the data without using the Disclosing Party’s information
    is_public: bool,                # true if the data is already public knowledge
    is_known_prior: bool,           # true if the Receiving Party already possessed the data before disclosure
    is_third_party_disclosed: bool, # true if a third party (with no duty to the Disclosing Party) disclosed the data
    is_legal_disclosure: bool,      # true if disclosure is required by law or governmental order
    is_written_consent: bool        # true if the Disclosing Party gave written consent to disclose
}

@ Clause 2 – Parties
type Party = {
    name: string,
    role: PartyRole,                # Disclosing or Receiving
    representatives: List<Representative>
}

type PartyRole = Disclosing | Receiving

type Representative = {
    name: string,
    position: string,
    is_aware_of_terms: bool
}

@ Clause 10 – Temporal data
type AgreementDates = {
    effective_date: int,   # days since epoch – used only for temporal reasoning
    termination_date: int, # effective_date + 5*365
    notice_period_days: int = 30,
    return_deadline_days: int = 7,
    survival_years: int = 3
}

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Entities
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 1 – Parties
entity disclosing_party: Party
entity receiving_party: Party

@ Clause 1 – Confidential Information (the object of the obligations)
entity confidential_information: ConfidentialInformation

@ Clause 10 – Dates needed for temporal rules
entity dates: AgreementDates

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Helper functions
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
func is_obligation_applicable(info: ConfidentialInformation) -> bool:
    # The confidentiality obligation applies iff the information is confidential
    # and none of the exclusion grounds apply.
    not info.is_confidential or
    info.is_public or
    info.is_known_prior or
    info.is_third_party_disclosed or
    info.is_legal_disclosure or
    info.is_written_consent or
    info.is_independently_developed

func within_days(target_day: int, delta: int) -> bool:
    -- true if the current step is no later than target_day + delta
    target_day <= now and now <= target_day + delta

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Rules – Obligations of the Receiving Party
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 3 – General confidentiality and non‑use obligations
rule O confidentiality_obligation:
    is_obligation_applicable(confidential_information) implies
    (confidential_information.is_confidential) always

@ Clause 3a – Reasonable protective measures
rule O reasonable_measures:
    is_obligation_applicable(confidential_information) implies
    (confidential_information.is_confidential) always   # abstract placeholder for “proper and reasonable measures”

@ Clause 3b – No disclosure to third parties without consent
rule O no_third_party_disclosure:
    is_obligation_applicable(confidential_information) implies
    (not confidential_information.is_written_consent) always

@ Clause 3c – Use limited to the Permitted Purpose
rule O use_limited_to_permitted_purpose:
    is_obligation_applicable(confidential_information) implies
    (confidential_information.is_confidential) always   # abstract placeholder for “use only for permitted purpose”

@ Clause 3d – No commercial use without consent
rule O no_commercial_use_without_consent:
    is_obligation_applicable(confidential_information) implies
    (not confidential_information.is_written_consent) always

@ Clause 3e – No copying without authorisation
rule O no_unauthorised_copy:
    is_obligation_applicable(confidential_information) implies
    (not confidential_information.is_written_consent) always

@ Clause 3f – No alteration, reverse‑engineering, etc.
rule O no_alteration_reverse_engineering:
    is_obligation_applicable(confidential_information) implies
    (not confidential_information.is_written_consent) always

@ Clause 3g – No patent/trademark filing that includes confidential data
rule O no_patent_filing:
    is_obligation_applicable(confidential_information) implies
    (not confidential_information.is_written_consent) always

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Rules – Disclosure to Representatives
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 4 – Care level for Representatives
rule O care_for_representatives:
    (receiving_party.role = Receiving) implies
    (all r in receiving_party.representatives:
        r.is_aware_of_terms) always

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Rules – Return / Destruction of Information
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 5 – Return or destroy at termination or on request
rule O return_or_destroy_by_deadline:
    (now >= dates.termination_date) implies
    (confidential_information.is_confidential) eventually
    and within_days(dates.termination_date, dates.return_deadline_days)

@ Clause 5 – Retention of one copy for regulatory/insurance purposes
rule O retain_one_copy_if_required:
    (confidential_information.is_confidential) implies
    (confidential_information.is_confidential) always   # abstract placeholder for “retain one copy securely”

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Rules – Duration and Survival
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 10 – Obligations survive for 3 years after disclosure
rule O survival_of_obligations:
    (confidential_information.is_confidential) implies
    (confidential_information.is_confidential) until
        (now >= dates.effective_date + dates.survival_years * 365)

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Rules – Exclusions (the hypothesis)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 2d – Independently developed information is excluded from the obligation
rule F confidentiality_not_required_for_independently_developed:
    confidential_information.is_independently_developed always

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Rules – Termination notice
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 10 – Either Party may terminate with 30‑day notice
rule O termination_notice:
    (now >= dates.effective_date) implies
    (now <= dates.effective_date + dates.notice_period_days) eventually

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Rules – Governing law, jurisdiction, and other boilerplate (non‑deontic)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
rule P governing_law_and_jurisdiction:
    true always   # placeholder – not a normative obligation for the solver

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# End of module
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
```
